description.ko: 고요한 심해 속 반투명 생체 막의 느린 물결이 황금빛 액체의 빛을 입자 가득한 물속으로 흘려보냅니다.
description.en: A slow underwater braid of living translucent membranes carries golden liquid light through a serene, particle-rich abyss.

prompt: AURA-7 organic flow artwork, "Pelagic Lumen Loom": a serene deep underwater scene where slow currents weave dozens of translucent ribbon-organisms into a loose drifting braid, not a net or lattice, each strand made of soft #7FB069 living membrane with muted #2D5A3D chlorophyll shadows sliding inside like submerged breath. Along the bends, #FFE66D bioluminescent liquid gathers in thin glowing veins, spills into hair-fine tendrils, and separates into warm droplets that hover among dense plankton sparks. The surrounding water is a pale #E6F2E1 abyssal mist with pearly microbubbles, faint green caustic glimmers, suspended organic dust, wet gelatinous surfaces, soft internal radiance, and gentle slow-motion blur. Emphasize breathing natural light, calm liquid flow, high particle density, delicate organic texture, and deep cinematic underwater depth; avoid figures, machines, architecture, rigid symmetry, sharp geometry, and cosmic space.
